mapper.select: SELECT c.CATEGORY_ID , c.CATEGORY_NM , c.SORT_ORDER , i.ITEM_ID , i.ITEM_NM , i.QUANTITY , i.IS_CHECKED , i.ASSIGNED_USER_ID , u.USER_NM AS ASSIGNED_USER_NM FROM SHOPPING_CATEGORY c LEFT JOIN SHOPPING_ITEM i ON i.CATEGORY_ID = c.CATEGORY_ID LEFT JOIN SWC_USER u ON u.USER_ID = i.ASSIGNED_USER_ID WHERE c.WS_ID = #{workspaceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY c.SORT_ORDER ASC, i.REGIST_DT ASC
SELECT CATEGORY_ID , CATEGORY_NM , SORT_ORDER FROM SHOPPING_CATEGORY WHERE WS_ID = #{workspaceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC
SELECT ITEM_ID , WS_ID , CATEGORY_ID , ITEM_NM , QUANTITY , IS_CHECKED , ASSIGNED_USER_ID FROM SHOPPING_ITEM WHERE ITEM_ID = #{itemId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SHOPPING_ITEM WHERE ITEM_ID = #{itemId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
